ddl.using: (SELECT current_setting('request.farm_id')::uuid) IN (SELECT farm_id FROM "drugs" WHERE id = "drug_treatment"."drug_id")
ddl.name: only farm members
authenticated users can read forum moderators
authenticated users can read forum replies
authenticated users can create forum replies
creator can update own forum replies
creator can delete own forum replies
authenticated users can read forum threads
authenticated users can create forum threads
creator can update own forum threads
creator can delete own forum threads

ddl.using: ((("profiles"."farm_id" is not null) and "profiles"."farm_id" = (select farm_id())) or (select auth.uid()) = "profiles"."id")
ddl.name: members of same farm can read each others profile and owners can read their own profile
authenticated users can read wiki categories
authenticated users can read wiki category translations

ddl.using: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT submitted_by FROM "wiki_change_requests" WHERE id = "wiki_change_request_notes"."change_request_id")
ddl.withCheck: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT submitted_by FROM "wiki_change_requests" WHERE id = "wiki_change_request_notes"."change_request_id") AND "wiki_change_request_notes"."author_id" = (SELECT auth.uid())
ddl.name: submitter can read and write notes on own change requests

ddl.using: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT submitted_by FROM "wiki_change_requests" WHERE id = "wiki_change_request_translations"."change_request_id")
ddl.withCheck: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT submitted_by FROM "wiki_change_requests" WHERE id = "wiki_change_request_translations"."change_request_id")
ddl.name: follow change request access for cr translations
submitter can read own change requests
submitter can update own draft change requests

ddl.using: ("wiki_entries"."status" = 'published'::wiki_entry_status AND "wiki_entries"."visibility" = 'public'::wiki_visibility) OR "wiki_entries"."created_by" = (SELECT auth.uid()) OR ("wiki_entries"."farm_id" IS NOT NULL AND "wiki_entries"."farm_id" = (SELECT current_setting('request.farm_id', TRUE)::uuid))
ddl.name: authenticated users can read wiki entries
authenticated users can create wiki entries
creator can update own wiki entries
creator can delete own private wiki entries

ddl.using:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "wiki_entries" we WHERE we.id = "wiki_entry_images"."entry_id" AND we.status = 'published'::wiki_entry_status AND we.visibility = 'public'::wiki_visibility)
        OR (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT created_by FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_images"."entry_id")
        OR (SELECT current_setting('request.farm_id', TRUE)::uuid) IN (SELECT farm_id FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_images"."entry_id" AND farm_id IS NOT NULL)
ddl.withCheck: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT created_by FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_images"."entry_id")
ddl.name: follow entry access for images

ddl.using:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "wiki_entries" we WHERE we.id = "wiki_entry_tags"."entry_id" AND we.status = 'published'::wiki_entry_status AND we.visibility = 'public'::wiki_visibility)
        OR (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT created_by FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_tags"."entry_id")
        OR (SELECT current_setting('request.farm_id', TRUE)::uuid) IN (SELECT farm_id FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_tags"."entry_id" AND farm_id IS NOT NULL)
ddl.withCheck: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT created_by FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_tags"."entry_id")
ddl.name: follow entry access for entry tags

ddl.using:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "wiki_entries" we WHERE we.id = "wiki_entry_translations"."entry_id" AND we.status = 'published'::wiki_entry_status AND we.visibility = 'public'::wiki_visibility)
        OR (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT created_by FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_translations"."entry_id")
        OR (SELECT current_setting('request.farm_id', TRUE)::uuid) IN (SELECT farm_id FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_translations"."entry_id" AND farm_id IS NOT NULL)
ddl.withCheck: (SELECT auth.uid()) IN (SELECT created_by FROM "wiki_entries" WHERE id = "wiki_entry_translations"."entry_id")
ddl.name: follow entry access for translations
authenticated users can read wiki moderators
authenticated users can read wiki tags
authenticated users can create wiki tags
